General.Name: Evergreen Products Group Ltd
General.Description: Evergreen Products Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the manufacturing and trading of hair products in the United States of America, Germany, Japan, the People's Republic of China, the United Kingdom, and internationally. The company offers fashion wigs, including long, medium and short, and half wigs; lace wigs, such as lace front, parting, braided, and 4×4 lace wigs; hair pieces and accessories comprising Melrose clips, drawstrings, domes/buns, and head band pieces; hair extension and weaving products; handtie wigs consisting mono, full handtie, and topper wigs; men's wigs and toupees; Halloween wigs; costumes; moustaches and beards; and doll wigs, as well as human hair wigs comprising tape extensions. It is also involved in the technological development of hair products; property investment and holding activities; trading of hair products through internet; logistics services; water treatment services; and manufacturing, export, and import of hair and festival products. Evergreen Products Group Limited was founded in 1962 and is headquartered in Kwai Chung, Hong Kong. Evergreen Products Group Limited is a subsidiary of Evergreen Enterprise Holdings Limited.
General.Address: Chiap Luen Industrial Building, Kwai Chung, Hong Kong
